name: uderia-outlook
description: Microsoft Outlook mail, calendar, and contacts integration. Provides read_emails, send_email, search_emails, list_calendar, create_event, and get_contacts tools. Requires user Microsoft account connection.

tool_schemas.name: read_emails
tool_schemas.description: Read recent emails from the user's Outlook inbox.

arguments.name: max_results
arguments.description: Maximum number of emails to return (default: 10, max: 50).

tool_schemas.name: send_email
tool_schemas.description: Send an email via the user's Outlook account.

arguments.name: time_min
arguments.description: Start time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z). Defaults to now.

tool_schemas.name: create_event
tool_schemas.description: Create a new Outlook Calendar event.

arguments.name: start_datetime
arguments.description: Start time in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2026-05-15T10:00:00.

tool_schemas.name: get_contacts
tool_schemas.description: Search the user's Outlook contacts by name or email.

AZURE_CLIENT_ID.label: Azure App (Client) ID
AZURE_CLIENT_ID.description: Application (client) ID from your Azure App Registration (Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Overview).

AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET.label: Azure Client Secret
AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Client secret from Azure Portal → App registrations → your app → Certificates & secrets.

AZURE_TENANT_ID.label: Azure Tenant ID (optional)
AZURE_TENANT_ID.description: Azure AD tenant ID to restrict to a single organisation. Leave empty to allow any Microsoft account (personal + work).

auth_schema.description: Connect your Microsoft account to enable Outlook mail and calendar tools.
